PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. . DEFENDANT DID NOT TIMLEY SUBMIT A REQUEST TO POSTPONE. JUDGE PRO TEM LYNN DID NOT GRANT DEFENDANTS EMAIL REQUEST OF JUNE 29, 2022 FOR A CONTINUANCE. ONLINE RECORDS SEARCH WITH US BANKRUPTCY COURT INDICATES THAT DEFENDANT FILED A VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL OF HER CHAPTER 13 BANKRUPTCY. PLAINTIFF PRODUCES EVIDENCE OF DEFENDANT'S VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL OF HER CHAPTER 13 BANKRUPTCY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROUTE 66 MOVING AND STORAGE, REPRESENTED BY MIKLAI SKORY, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATHRYN KELSON IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT INQUIRES WITH DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY STATUS. DEFENDANT STATES THAT THE PETITION FOR BANKRUPTCY HAS BEEN CONFIRMED, BUT IS UNABLE TO PROVIDE PROOF TO THE COURT REGARDING THE BANKRUPTCY CONFIRMATION. COURT RECESS AT 10:42 A.M. TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO OBTAIN HER CONFIRMATION OF BANKRUPTCY. MATTER IS RECALLED AT 11:40 A.M. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED TO THE COURT HER ORDER CONFIRMING CHAPTER 13 PLAN AND RELATED SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
